title: The Depths of Impel Down: Aftermath
description: In the Impel Down storyline, this section centers on Magellan, Whitebeard, Unknown person #13, Unknown person #2, Ace as the scene develops across pages 16–18.
scene: This scene advances the Impel Down conflict through Magellan, Whitebeard, Unknown person #13, Unknown person #2, Ace, focusing on the immediate stakes of the depths of impel down: aftermath.

dialogue.speaker: Magellan
dialogue.text: We're going back to business as usual....!!

dialogue.speaker: Magellan
dialogue.text: W... W... We escaped from torture!!

dialogue.speaker: Magellan
dialogue.text: We're going to save straw- Chan!!!

dialogue.speaker: Whitebeard
dialogue.text: D... Did you say Rescue Him!!?

dialogue.speaker: Whitebeard
dialogue.text: He's been drowned in Magellan's poison!

dialogue.speaker: Whitebeard
dialogue.text: I left my life there as well....!!

dialogue.speaker: Whitebeard
dialogue.text: I don't need any other reason!!!

summary: This scene advances the Impel Down conflict through Magellan, Whitebeard, Unknown person #13, Unknown person #2, Ace, focusing on the immediate stakes of the depths of impel down: aftermath.
